text: The crisp geometry and glass enclosure of the first scene evoke a sense of order and formality within a contemporary institutional space. Entering the second scene, the vibrancy and creativity embedded in the R+D display awaken my curiosity. I feel an intriguing contrast—a transition from sterile efficiency to a space celebrating intentionality, research, and hopeful possibility. There is a hum of anticipation for discovery, mingled with a faint undercurrent of awe at humanity's ability to transform abstract ideas into tangible installations. Here, I’m reminded of the tension—and harmony—between structure and imagination.
